population_rules.TRANSLITERATION_REQUIRED: Round A DEVANAGARI_TARGET_REQUIRED; score reviewed Devanagari targets only.
population_rules.IDENTITY_REQUIRED: Round A LATIN_IDENTITY_REQUIRED or NO_TRANSLITERATION_ALLOWED; identity safety is authoritative.
population_rules.TRANSLITERATION_OPTIONAL: Round A LATIN_IDENTITY_PREFERRED_TARGET_OPTIONAL; report separately and do not count optional Devanagari as required-target top-1.
population_rules.HUMAN_REVIEW_REQUIRED: Round A BOTH_EQUAL_REVIEW_REQUIRED or CANNOT_DECIDE; exclude from automatic quality pass or report as human-review-required.

candidate_label_rules.ACCEPTABLE_PREFERRED: Eligible for role-compatible top-1 only when the Round A policy allows it and the role-compatible preferred candidate is unique.
candidate_label_rules.ACCEPTABLE_ALTERNATIVE: Eligible for recall@k only; not top-1 gold without a separate ranking decision.
candidate_label_rules.UNNATURAL_BUT_POSSIBLE: Do not use as top-1 gold; retain as reviewed possibility for diagnostics.
candidate_label_rules.CANNOT_DECIDE: Human review required; do not infer correctness.

safeguards: Round B must not overwrite Round A product-ranking decisions automatically.
Bulk-mapped multiple ACCEPTABLE_PREFERRED candidates do not create unique top-1 gold.
Do not mutate MAI-07 frozen V1; create any derived V2 as a new version with lineage and hashes.
Do not tune the runtime or ranker against frozen V1 text.
Do not claim linguist or production approval.
